name: Bishop Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the flour and 1 cup of chopped pecans until well combined.
3. Continue stirring until a thick paste is formed, with no flour lumps remaining.
4. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
6. Allow to cool completely before assembling the pie filling.
7. Prepare the first layer of filling by combining cream cheese, confectioners sugar, and whipped topping in a bowl until smooth.
8. As soon as the chocolate pudding layer firms up slightly, spoon on more whipped topping, smoothing it out evenly and adding an additional 1/2 inch (1 cm) layer above the chocolate layer.
9. Sprinkle with the remaining chopped pecans.
10. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
